subcodes.first_line: The Day is come, and yet the people have turned away from Him, and that which was promised in His Books hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی الیوم و القوم اعرضوا عنه و اتی ما کان موعودا فی کتبه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @chastisement and requital, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power of the Manifestation of God, @call to action
